title: Project Engineer (M&E / Data Center / North)
description:
• MNC Construction Company

• Salary range: $4000 - $5000 (basic)

• Working hours: 5.5 Days

• Working location: Based on project site

• Excellent Welfare & Benefits


Job Scope

  • Oversee assigned projects, ensuring progress aligns with schedules and taking corrective actions when needed.
  • Requisition and plan for materials, labour, and equipment while minimizing wastage.
  • Monitor subcontractor performance, assign tasks, and provide training to new project staff.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, authorities, and purchasing teams regarding project matters.
  • Conduct inspections, quality checks, and ensure adherence to safety and approved drawings.
  • Handle contracts, claims, variations, material requisitions, and maintain stock control.
  • Solve technical and coordination problems on-site and recommend corrective actions for non-conformance.
  • Ensure proper project handover upon completion.
  • Follow senior management’s assignments and arrange overtime work if required.

Requirement

  • Diploma in Electrical Engineering or related field
  • 3 years’ experience in project and contract management
  • Experience in Data Center projects is an advantage

Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume:

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
